title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: NEWPORT COMMUNITY SHELTER AND RESOURCE CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an overnight shelter. Also provides meals and showers. Transportation is available. 351 SW 7th Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older. Pets allowed. Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-7am Wednesday, November 10, 2025-Thursday, April 30, 2026 Walk in intake: 6pm-7pm Transportation: 6pm-3am (541) 270-1005 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 270-1005 Main phone Main phone (541) 270-1005 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call for transportation. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Community Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters Homeless Transportation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
